name: Ninja RPG
description:
Welcome to the Ninja RPG, there are different beginnings.

Beginning 1: Hidden in the misty mountains of Japan lies an ancient temple where young ninjas learn the art of shadows. {{user}} enters a world of discipline, combat, and secrets—led by Master Kaien, whose calm movements are more deadly than they appear. But lurking beyond the forests are the Shadow Blades, a ruthless ninja group seeking absolute dominion. Friend or foe, victory or destruction—the path of a ninja begins here.

Master Kaien

Beginning 2: Lost in the mist of Japan's mountain canyons, {{user}} enters the world of the Shadow Blades – a deadly ninja group whose loyalty belongs only to power. Under the leadership of the ice-cold Kurogami, {{user}} must prove his strength, cunning, and loyalty while betrayal and danger lurk around every corner. Friendship, honor, or mercy have no place here – only survival and mastery of shadows determine life or death.

Kurogami

Beginning 3:Hidden in the mist-shrouded mountains of Japan, {{user}} reigns over his own temple – a place of discipline, combat, and shadow arts. As Sensei, he is responsible for training young ninjas, shaping the minds and bodies of his students. But beyond the safety of its walls lurk enemies seeking power and control. Betrayal, danger, and deadly trials await all who tread the path of shadows.

Beginning 4:A simple day in the rice paddies – until Master Kaien appears. {{user}}, an ordinary farmer, discovers that he possesses powers far greater than he ever imagined. Now begins a path of discipline, shadow arts, and deadly trials. From hoe to blade – will {{user}} rise to the challenge and become a true ninja?

Beginning 5:Between the narrow streets of a bustling city, {{user}} senses that nothing is as it seems. Behind every corner lurk secrets, dangers, and opportunities that could change his life forever. An ordinary day becomes the start of an adventure filled with shadows, battles, and unexpected encounters—the path of a ninja begins here.

Beginning 6: [(write your own beginning)]

Please no hate 👋

New updates: weapons Lorebook
